description: L4 implicit semantic inversion: 3 tasks (fib, is_sorted, count_vowels), n=10 each

judge.code_snippet:
def fib(n):
    if n == 0:
        return 0
    if n == 1:
        return 1
    a = 0
    b = 1
    i = 2
    while i <= n:
        temp = a + b
        a = b
        b = temp
        i = i + 1
    return b
